title: Harness Engineering: What Separates Top Agentic Engineers Right Now
summary: Harness engineering is the practice of building robust wrapper systems around LLM-based coding agents. It consists of two levels: an AI layer managing single-session rules and hooks, and orchestration of multiple agent sessions into workflows with focused responsibilities. The harness rather than the model is the dominant factor in production systems.
